blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,208 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
